prompt: A high-end lifestyle e-commerce photo of a stylish woman walking along a quiet Parisian street in autumn, captured from behind in a candid editorial moment. She is centered slightly left, mid-stride on a cobblestone-and-pavement sidewalk, turning her head gently toward the elegant Haussmann apartment buildings lined with wrought-iron balconies and flower boxes. She wears a long tailored wool coat in camel beige, dark straight-leg trousers, and dark brown leather ankle boots, with a structured leather crossbody satchel in warm tan hanging at her hip. She has shoulder-length wavy dark brown hair and holds a folded newspaper or magazine in one hand. The street includes exactly 6 black metal bollards visible in the foreground and midground, scattered dry autumn leaves on the ground, and tall trees on the right side with golden-brown foliage. In the background, softly blurred pedestrians walk down the boulevard, and a corner café with the visible sign CAFÉ LE PARISIEN appears on the left, with the same café name faintly repeated farther down the street. Warm golden-hour lighting, shallow depth of field, natural skin tones, creamy background bokeh, refined neutral color palette, luxury travel editorial styling, realistic photography, vertical composition, 4:5 aspect ratio, premium advertising image quality.
